title: Babbitt
writer: Sinclair Lewis, Mary C. McCall Jr., Tom Reed
actors: Aline MacMahon, Guy Kibbee, Claire Dodd
plot: Middle-aged George F. Babbitt is a leading citizen in the town of Zenith, the fastest-growing community in America according to its town sign. George is a large part of that growth as a property developer and realtor.
